contentDescriptions.description: Investigate and analyse the internal and external influences on adolescent health decisions and develop strategies to promote wellbeing.
Examine personal strengths, manage emotions and apply skills to establish and maintain respectful relationships.
Demonstrate and refine specialised movement skills in a range of physical activity contexts.
Apply movement concepts and strategies to improve performance and collaborate with others in physical activities.
Investigate how personal identity, cultural values and societal expectations shape health decisions and behaviours.
Evaluate strategies to promote health and wellbeing in the community and critically analyse health information.
Critically evaluate the effectiveness of health promotion strategies and develop action plans to address health issues in the community.
